defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Cristiano Ronaldo's face celebrating intensely in a Portugal red jersey, his face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: As a poor kid in Lisbon Cristiano Ronaldo used to beg for leftover burgers from a McDonald's back door, and years later as a global superstar he searched for the women who fed him just to thank them
videos.video_script: As a hungry kid, Ronaldo begged for leftover burgers behind McDonald's. When he became a superstar, he searched for the women who fed him, just to say thank you. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Cristiano Ronaldo celebration close up, Cristiano Ronaldo Portugal red jersey, Cristiano Ronaldo Al Nassr goal celebration, Cristiano Ronaldo siu celebration close up, Cristiano Ronaldo face close up, Cristiano Ronaldo arms wide celebration, Cristiano Ronaldo emotional, Cristiano Ronaldo smiling close up, Cristiano Ronaldo screaming celebration, Cristiano Ronaldo Portugal national team
